NAME

global_dec3_cache_t - Global decimal cache for digit conversion.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/common.h>

Data Fields


dec3_t dec3_table [256]
bool dec3_initialized

Detailed Description

Global decimal cache for digit conversion.
